## Accessibility:

- [ ] **ScreenReader Navigation** – Ensure keyboard navigation announces actions and focuses correctly. (JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack)
- [ ] **HTML Validation** – Validate HTML changes; ignore React-specific errors.
- [ ] **A11y Fixes** – Resolved **axe-core** and **Evinced** violations.
- [ ] **Zoom Support** – Ensure the app functions correctly at **200% zoom** and **400% zoom** with responsive layout.
- [ ] **AXE Scan** – Used the Chrome AXE plugin to scan relevant pages.
